sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_byte_swap (id UInt32, original_value UInt32, swapped_value UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_byte_swap (id, original_value, swapped_value) VALUES (1, 3351772109, byteSwap(3351772109));
UPDATE test_byte_swap SET swapped_value = byteSwap(original_value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_value, swapped_value FROM test_byte_swap WHERE swapped_value = byteSwap(123456789);
